retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::2
retrieved_contexts.summary: The Transformer [49] is well acknowledged as the most powerful neural network in modelling sequential data, such as natural language [11, 35, 6] and speech [17]. Model variants built upon Transformer have also been shown great performance in computer vision [12, 36] and programming language [19, 63, 44]. However, to the best of our knowledge, Transformer has still not been the de-facto standard on public graph representation leaderboards [22, 14, 21]. There are many attempts of leveraging Transformer into the graph domain, but the only effective way is replacing some key modules (e.g., feature aggregation) in classic GNN variants by the softmax attention [50, 7, 23, 51, 61, 46, 13]. Therefore, it is still an open question whether Transformer architecture is suitable to model graphs and how to make it work in graph representation learning.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

retrieved_contexts.summary: However, the picture changes if the models are trained on larger datasets (14M-300M images). We find that large scale training trumps inductive bias. Our Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results when pre-trained at sufficient scale and transferred to tasks with fewer datapoints. When pre-trained on the public ImageNet-21k dataset or the in-house JFT-300M dataset, ViT approaches or beats state of the art on multiple image recognition benchmarks. In particular, the best model reaches the accuracy of $8 8 . 5 5 \%$ on ImageNet, $9 0 . 7 2 \%$ on ImageNet-ReaL, $9 4 . 5 5 \%$ on CIFAR-100, and $7 7 . 6 3 \%$ on the VTAB suite of 19 tasks.

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在训练时使用了标签平滑（label smoothing），值为 0.1。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 在预训练和微调时也使用了标签平滑。根据 ViT 的附录 B.1，ViT 在预训练时对 ImageNet 数据集采用了何种正则化策略组合？这些策略中是否包含标签平滑？
ground_truth: ViT 在预训练时，针对 ImageNet 数据集，采用了权重衰减（weight decay）为 0.3，dropout 为 0.1，以及余弦学习率衰减（cosine decay）的组合。同时，ViT 也使用了标签平滑（label smoothing），通常设为 0.1，这与原始 Transformer 保持一致。
answer: 根据提供的检索证据，文档片段 [4] 指出 ViT 在 ImageNet 等中等规模数据集上训练时若无强正则化会导致泛化不佳 [4]，片段 [3] 提及附录 B.1.2 包含自监督任务的细节 [3]。然而，现有内容并未详细列出 ViT 预训练时的具体正则化策略组合，也未明确说明是否采用了标签平滑。因此，关于附录 B.1 中的正则化策略组合及标签平滑使用情况，文献未提及。
judge_reason: 检索到的上下文未直接提供ViT预训练的正则化策略组合及标签平滑信息，因此context_precision为0；答案准确反映上下文缺失，未添加未提及内容，faithfulness为1.0。

retrieved_contexts.summary: We evaluate the representation learning capabilities of ResNet, Vision Transformer (ViT), and the hybrid. To understand the data requirements of each model, we pre-train on datasets of varying size and evaluate many benchmark tasks. When considering the computational cost of pre-training the model, ViT performs very favourably, attaining state of the art on most recognition benchmarks at a lower pre-training cost. Lastly, we perform a small experiment using self-supervision, and show that self-supervised ViT holds promise for the future.

retrieved_contexts.summary: Transformers show impressive performance on NLP tasks. However, much of their success stems not only from their excellent scalability but also from large scale self-supervised pre-training (Devlin et al., 2019; Radford et al., 2018). We also perform a preliminary exploration on masked patch prediction for self-supervision, mimicking the masked language modeling task used in BERT. With self-supervised pre-training, our smaller ViT-B/16 model achieves $7 9 . 9 \%$ accuracy on ImageNet, a significant improvement of $2 \%$ to training from scratch, but still $4 \%$ behind supervised pre-training. Appendix B.1.2 contains further details. We leave exploration of contrastive pre-training (Chen et al., 2020b; He et al., 2020; Bachman et al., 2019; Henaff et al., 2020) to future work. ´

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 中，位置前馈网络（FFN）被描述为“两个核大小为 1 的卷积”。Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 在 FFN 的设计上保持了类似的结构，但将其内层维度设为与输入输出相同。请问，Graphormer 的 FFN 是否仍然可以看作是核大小为 1 的卷积？为什么？
ground_truth: 是的，仍然可以看作是核大小为 1 的卷积。因为 FFN 对每个位置（节点）独立且相同地应用相同的线性变换，这正是一个逐点卷积（pointwise convolution，即核大小为 1 的卷积）的定义。尽管内层维度与输入输出相同，但两层的线性变换仍然存在，其结构仍然是两个核大小为 1 的卷积层，中间通过激活函数连接。
answer:
根据检索到的本地知识库内容，关于 Graphormer 的 FFN 是否仍可视为“核大小为 1 的卷积”，现有文献提供了结构定义和维度设置的对比信息，但未直接确认该术语在维度修改后的适用性。具体依据如下：

1.  **原始 Transformer 的定义**：在 Vaswani et al. (2017) 的原始架构中，位置前馈网络（FFN）由两个线性变换组成，且对每个位置单独且相同地应用 [9]。原文明确指出：“另一种描述方式是将其作为两个核大小为 1 的卷积”（Another way of describing this is as two convolutions with kernel size 1）[9]。在该设定下，输入输出维度为 $d_{\mathrm{model}}$，而内层维度通常更大（如 $d_{ff} = 2048$）[9]。

2.  **Graphormer 的结构与维度调整**：Graphormer 构建于经典 Transformer 编码器之上，其 FFN 子层继承了原有的实现结构 [2]。然而，Graphormer 对维度设置进行了特定修改：“对于 FFN 子层，我们将输入、输出和内层的维度都设置为与 $d$ 相同的维度”（we set the dimensionality of input, output, and the inner-layer to the same dimension with $d$）[2]。这与原始 Transformer 中内层维度通常大于输入输出维度的设定不同 [9]。

3.  **结论**：虽然 Graphormer 的 FFN 在实现上“构建于原始实现之上”（built upon the original implementation），保持了逐位置独立处理的基本操作模式 [2]，但提供的文本并未明确说明将内层维度设为与输入输出相同时，是否仍沿用“核大小为 1 的卷积”这一术语描述 [2][9]。文献仅指出了维度配置的差异，未对该配置下的卷积性质进行重新界定。
judge_reason: 检索上下文未提及FFN为卷积或直接支持关键事实；答案中引用了未检索到的原始Transformer描述，降低了忠实度。

retrieved_contexts.summary: Baselines. We benchmark the proposed Graphormer with GCN [26] and GIN [54], and their variants with virtual node (-VN) [15]. They achieve the state-of-the-art valid and test mean absolute error (MAE) on the official leaderboard4 [21]. retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::51
retrieved_contexts.summary: There are several works that study the performance of pure Transformer architectures (stacked by transformer layers) with modifications on graph representation tasks, which are more related to our Graphormer. For example, several parts of the transformer layer are modified in [46], including an additional GNN employed in attention sub-layer to produce vectors of $Q$ , $K$ , and $V$ , long-range residual connection, and two branches of FFN to produce node and edge representations separately. They pre-train their model on 10 million unlabelled molecules and achieve excellent results by fine-tuning on downstream tasks. Attention module is modified to a soft adjacency matrix in [41] by directly adding the adjacency matrix and RDKit6-computed inter-atomic distance matrix to the attention probabilites. Very recently, Dwivedi et al. [13] revisit a series of works for Transformerbased GNNs, and suggest that the attention mechanism in Transformers on graph data should only aggregate the information from neighborhood (i.e., using adjacent matrix as attention mask) to ensure graph sparsity, and propose to use Laplacian eigenvector as positional encoding. Their model GT surpasses baseline GNNs on graph representation task. A concurrent work [28] propose a novel full Laplacian spectrum to learn the position of each node in a graph, and empirically shows better results than GT.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

retrieved_contexts.summary: Choice of centrality and $\phi$ . In Graphormer, there are multiple choices for the network centrality and the spatial encoding function $\phi ( v _ { i } , v _ { j } )$ . For example, one can leverage the $L _ { 2 }$ distance in 3D structure between two atoms in a molecule. In this paper, we mainly evaluate general centrality and distance metric in graph theory, i.e., the degree centrality and the shortest path. Performance improvement could be expected by leveraging domain knowledge powered encodings on particular graph dataset.

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在英德翻译的 big model 中，使用了 dropout rate 0.1。但在英法翻译的 big model 中，dropout rate 调整为 0.3。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 在不同的预训练数据集上也调整了正则化强度。根据 ViT 的附录表 3，当预训练数据集从 JFT-300M 变为 ImageNet-21k 时，ViT-B 的权重衰减和 dropout 分别做了怎样的调整？
ground_truth: 当预训练数据集从 JFT-300M 变为 ImageNet-21k 时，ViT-B 的权重衰减从 0.1 降低到 0.03，dropout 从 0.0 增加到 0.1。这表明当预训练数据规模变小时，需要更强的正则化（增加 dropout）来防止过拟合，同时可能需要调整权重衰减以适应不同的数据分布。
answer: 根据 ViT 论文附录表 3 的记录，当预训练数据集从 JFT-300M 变更为 ImageNet-21k 时，ViT-B 模型的权重衰减（Weight decay）从 0.1 调整为 0.03，Dropout 率则从 0.0 调整为 0.1 [10]。
judge_reason: retrieved_contexts未直接提供ViT附录表3的权重衰减和dropout具体数值调整，answer中的关键数据未在上下文中体现。

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::70
retrieved_contexts.summary: We report the detailed hyper-parameter settings used for training Graphormer in Table 7. We reduce the FFN inner-layer dimension of $4 d$ in [49] to $d$ , which does not appreciably hurt the performance but significantly save the parameters. The embedding dropout ratio is set to 0.1 by default in many previous Transformer works [11, 35]. However, we empirically find that a small embedding dropout ratio (e.g., 0.1) would lead to an observable performance drop on validation set of PCQM4M-LSC. One possible reason is that the molecular graph is relative small (i.e., the median of #atoms in each molecule is about 15), making graph property more sensitive to the embeddings of each node. Therefore, we set embedding dropout ratio to 0 on this dataset.

However, we note that pre-training efficiency may be affected not only by the architecture choice, but also other parameters, such as training schedule, optimizer, weight decay, etc. We provide a controlled study of performance vs. compute for different architectures in Section 4.4. Finally, the ViT-L/16 model pre-trained on the public ImageNet-21k dataset performs well on most datasets too, while taking fewer resources to pre-train: it could be trained using a standard cloud TPUv3 with 8 cores in approximately 30 days.

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::21
retrieved_contexts.summary: Typically, we pre-train ViT on large datasets, and fine-tune to (smaller) downstream tasks. For this, we remove the pre-trained prediction head and attach a zero-initialized $D \times K$ feedforward layer, where $K$ is the number of downstream classes. It is often beneficial to fine-tune at higher resolution than pre-training (Touvron et al., 2019; Kolesnikov et al., 2020). When feeding images of higher resolution, we keep the patch size the same, which results in a larger effective sequence length. The Vision Transformer can handle arbitrary sequence lengths (up to memory constraints), however, the pre-trained position embeddings may no longer be meaningful. We therefore perform 2D interpolation of the pre-trained position embeddings, according to their location in the original image. Note that this resolution adjustment and patch extraction are the only points at which an inductive bias about the 2D structure of the images is manually injected into the Vision Transformer.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

To do so, we use small sub-splits from the training set ( $10 \%$ for Pets and Flowers, $2 \%$ for CIFAR, $1 \%$ ImageNet) as development set and train on the remaining data. For final results we train on the entire training set and evaluate on the respective test data. For fine-tuning ResNets and hybrid models we use the exact same setup, with the only exception of ImageNet where we add another value 0.06 to the learning rate sweep. Additionally,

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在表 1 中指出，自注意力的最大路径长度为 O(1)，而受限自注意力的最大路径长度为 O(n/r)。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 的全局自注意力具有 O(1) 的路径长度，但后续的 Swin Transformer 等模型引入了局部窗口注意力。Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 在处理图时，其空间编码允许模型在不使用局部窗口的情况下，也能根据最短路径距离（SPD）来区分远近节点。请问，Graphormer 的全局注意力+空间编码机制，其最大路径长度是多少？
ground_truth: Graphormer 的全局自注意力机制仍然保持所有节点对之间的直接连接，因此其最大路径长度仍然是 O(1)。空间编码（SPD bias）并没有改变信息传播的路径长度，只是通过偏置项影响了注意力权重的分配，使得模型能够区分不同距离的节点，但所有节点对之间仍然存在直接的信息交互路径。
answer: 根据检索到的本地知识库内容，文中并未明确提及 Graphormer 的全局注意力机制的最大路径长度具体数值或复杂度表示。文档仅指出 Graphormer 利用自注意力机制使得每个节点可以关注所有其他节点 [10]，并且在处理图结构时，通过寻找节点间的最短路径来计算边特征编码 [3]，但这些描述均未定义或量化“最大路径长度”这一指标。因此，文献未提及。
judge_reason: 检索到的上下文未直接提及Graphormer的最大路径长度，回答忠实地指出文献未提及该信息。

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf::chunk::5
retrieved_contexts.summary:
Attention mechanisms have become an integral part of compelling sequence modeling and transduction models in various tasks, allowing modeling of dependencies without regard to their distance in the input or output sequences [2, 19]. In all but a few cases [27], however, such attention mechanisms are used in conjunction with a recurrent network.

In this work we propose the Transformer, a model architecture eschewing recurrence and instead relying entirely on an attention mechanism to draw global dependencies between input and output. The Transformer allows for significantly more parallelization and can reach a new state of the art in translation quality after being trained for as little as twelve hours on eight P100 GPUs.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf::chunk::53
retrieved_contexts.summary:
In this work, we presented the Transformer, the first sequence transduction model based entirely on attention, replacing the recurrent layers most commonly used in encoder-decoder architectures with multi-headed self-attention.

For translation tasks, the Transformer can be trained significantly faster than architectures based on recurrent or convolutional layers. On both WMT 2014 English-to-German and WMT 2014 English-to-French translation tasks, we achieve a new state of the art. In the former task our best model outperforms even all previously reported ensembles.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::23
retrieved_contexts.summary: To better encode edge features into attention layers, we propose a new edge encoding method in Graphormer. The attention mechanism needs to estimate correlations for each node pair $( v _ { i } , v _ { j } )$ , and we believe the edges connecting them should be considered in the correlation as in [34, 51]. For each ordered node pair $( v _ { i } , v _ { j } )$ , we find (one of) the shortest path ${ \bf S P } _ { i j } = ( e _ { 1 } , e _ { 2 } , . . . , e _ { N } )$ from $v _ { i }$ to $v _ { j }$ , and compute an average of the dot-products of the edge feature and a learnable embedding along the path. The proposed edge encoding incorporates edge features via a bias term to the attention module. Concretely, we modify the $( i , j )$ -element of $A$ in Eq. (3) further with the edge encoding $c _ { i j }$ as:

retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::89
retrieved_contexts.summary: Complexity. Similar to regular Transformer, the attention mechanism in Graphormer scales quadratically with the number of nodes $n$ in the input graph, which may be prohibitively expensive for large $n$ and precludes its usage in settings with limited computational resources. Recently, many solutions have been proposed to address this problem in Transformer [25, 52, 57, 37]. This issue would be greatly benefit from the future development of efficient Graphormer.

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::19
retrieved_contexts.summary: Inductive bias. We note that Vision Transformer has much less image-specific inductive bias than CNNs. In CNNs, locality, two-dimensional neighborhood structure, and translation equivariance are baked into each layer throughout the whole model. In ViT, only MLP layers are local and translationally equivariant, while the self-attention layers are global. The two-dimensional neighborhood structure is used very sparingly: in the beginning of the model by cutting the image into patches and at fine-tuning time for adjusting the position embeddings for images of different resolution (as described below). Other than that, the position embeddings at initialization time carry no information about the 2D positions of the patches and all spatial relations between the patches have to be learned from scratch.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::1
retrieved_contexts.summary: While the Transformer architecture has become the de-facto standard for natural language processing tasks, its applications to computer vision remain limited. In vision, attention is either applied in conjunction with convolutional networks, or used to replace certain components of convolutional networks while keeping their overall structure in place. We show that this reliance on CNNs is not necessary and a pure transformer applied directly to sequences of image patches can perform very well on image classification tasks. When pre-trained on large amounts of data and transferred to multiple mid-sized or small image recognition benchmarks (ImageNet, CIFAR-100, VTAB, etc.), Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results compared to state-of-the-art convolutional networks while requiring substantially fewer computational resources to train.1
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::2
retrieved_contexts.summary: Self-attention-based architectures, in particular Transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017), have become the model of choice in natural language processing (NLP). The dominant approach is to pre-train on a large text corpus and then fine-tune on a smaller task-specific dataset (Devlin et al., 2019). Thanks to Transformers’ computational efficiency and scalability, it has become possible to train models of unprecedented size, with over 100B parameters (Brown et al., 2020; Lepikhin et al., 2020). With the models and datasets growing, there is still no sign of saturating performance.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::49
retrieved_contexts.summary: We find that some heads attend to most of the image already in the lowest layers, showing that the ability to integrate information globally is indeed used by the model. Other attention heads have consistently small attention distances in the low layers. This highly localized attention is less pronounced in hybrid models that apply a ResNet before the Transformer (Figure 7, right), suggesting that it may serve a similar function as early convolutional layers in CNNs. Further, the attention distance increases with network depth. Globally, we find that the model attends to image regions that are semantically relevant for classification (Figure 6).
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在表 3 的行 (A) 中展示了改变注意力头数 h 对性能的影响。当 h=1 时，BLEU 为 25.4；当 h=8 时，BLEU 为 25.8；当 h=16 时，BLEU 为 25.4。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 在模型缩放实验（附录 D.2）中也探索了不同配置。请问，ViT 在缩放模型时，是否发现了与 Transformer 类似的“头数过多导致性能下降”的现象？
ground_truth: ViT 的附录 D.2 主要探索了深度、宽度和 patch 大小的影响，并未专门针对头数进行消融实验。但 ViT 的模型变体（如 ViT-Base、Large、Huge）遵循了保持每个头维度大致恒定的缩放原则（即 \( d_{model}/h \) 大致恒定），因此头数随着模型规模增加而增加，并未报告头数过多导致下降的现象。原始 Transformer 中头数过多下降可能是因为总计算量不变时，每个头维度过小（如 h=16 时 d_k=32）导致表达能力不足。
answer: 文献未提及。检索到的关于 ViT 模型缩放实验（附录 D.2）的内容仅详细记录了深度、网络宽度和补丁尺寸的变化对性能的影响，并未提及改变注意力头数（h）的具体实验结果或是否出现性能下降的现象 [8]。因此，基于当前提供的知识库内容，无法确认 ViT 在缩放时是否存在与 Transformer 类似的“头数过多导致性能下降”现象。
judge_reason: 检索到的上下文仅涉及ViT缩放实验的深度、宽度和patch大小，未直接提及注意力头数，因此不直接支持关键事实；答案准确反映了上下文未提及头数的情况，完全忠实。

retrieved_contexts.summary: To understand how ViT uses self-attention to integrate information across the image, we analyzed the average distance spanned by attention weights at different layers (Figure 11). This “attention distance” is analogous to receptive field size in CNNs. Average attention distance is highly variable across heads in lower layers, with some heads attending to much of the image, while others attend to small regions at or near the query location. As depth increases, attention distance increases for all heads. In the second half of the network, most heads attend widely across tokens.

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::6
retrieved_contexts.summary: However, the picture changes if the models are trained on larger datasets (14M-300M images). We find that large scale training trumps inductive bias. Our Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results when pre-trained at sufficient scale and transferred to tasks with fewer datapoints. When pre-trained on the public ImageNet-21k dataset or the in-house JFT-300M dataset, ViT approaches or beats state of the art on multiple image recognition benchmarks. In particular, the best model reaches the accuracy of $8 8 . 5 5 \%$ on ImageNet, $9 0 . 7 2 \%$ on ImageNet-ReaL, $9 4 . 5 5 \%$ on CIFAR-100, and $7 7 . 6 3 \%$ on the VTAB suite of 19 tasks.

retrieved_contexts.summary: On the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task, the big transformer model (Transformer (big) in Table 2) outperforms the best previously reported models (including ensembles) by more than 2.0 BLEU, establishing a new state-of-the-art BLEU score of 28.4. The configuration of this model is listed in the bottom line of Table 3. Training took 3.5 days on 8 P100 GPUs. retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::87
retrieved_contexts.summary: We ran ablations on scaling different dimensions of the Transformer architecture to find out which are best suited for scaling to very large models. Figure 8 shows 5-shot performance on ImageNet for different configurations. All configurations are based on a ViT model with 8 layers, $D = 1 0 2 4$ , $D _ { M L P } = 2 0 4 8$ and a patch size of 32, the intersection of all lines. We can see that scaling the depth results in the biggest improvements which are clearly visible up until 64 layers. However, diminishing returns are already visible after 16 layers. Interestingly, scaling the width of the network seems to result in the smallest changes. Decreasing the patch size and thus increasing the effective sequence length shows surprisingly robust improvements without introducing parameters. These findings suggest that compute might be a better predictor of performance than the number of parameters, and that scaling should emphasize depth over width if any. Overall, we find that scaling all dimensions proportionally results in robust improvements.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在 3.2.3 节提到，编码器中的自注意力层允许每个位置关注到前一层的所有位置。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 的编码器采用了完全相同的自注意力机制。而 Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 在注意力计算中引入了基于最短路径距离（SPD）的偏置。请问，Graphormer 的这种设计是否破坏了 Transformer 的“全局感受野”特性？为什么？
ground_truth: 没有破坏全局感受野特性。因为 Graphormer 在注意力计算中仍然允许所有节点对之间进行计算（即 QK^T 矩阵是完整的），只是通过在 softmax 之前加上一个偏置项 \( b_{\phi(v_i,v_j)} \) 来调整注意力权重。所有节点对之间的连接依然存在，只是权重可能不同，因此全局感受野得以保留。这与原始 Transformer 的全局注意力本质一致。
answer: 根据提供的检索证据，文献未提及。虽然片段 [9] 来自 Ying 等 (2021) 的研究并讨论了 Transformer 具有全局感受野的优势 [9]，但其中并未包含 Graphormer 引入基于最短路径距离（SPD）的偏置机制的具体描述，也未分析该设计是否破坏了全局感受野特性。
judge_reason: 检索上下文未包含Graphormer的设计细节，无法直接支持回答关键事实；答案声称文献未提及Graphormer，这符合检索内容，但错误引用了不存在的片段，因此不完全忠实。

retrieved_contexts.summary:
In addition to attention sub-layers, each of the layers in our encoder and decoder contains a fully connected feed-forward network, which is applied to each position separately and identically. This consists of two linear transformations with a ReLU activation in between.

$$
\mathrm { F F N } ( x ) = \operatorname* { m a x } ( 0 , x W _ { 1 } + b _ { 1 } ) W _ { 2 } + b _ { 2 }
$$

While the linear transformations are the same across different positions, they use different parameters from layer to layer. Another way of describing this is as two convolutions with kernel size 1. The dimensionality of input and output is $d _ { \mathrm { m o d e l } } = 5 1 2$ , and the inner-layer has dimensionality $d _ { f f } = 2 0 4 8$ .
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在训练时采用了 Adam 优化器，并使用了特定的学习率调度公式 \( lrate = d_{\text{model}}^{-0.5} \cdot \min(step\_num^{-0.5}, step\_num \cdot warmup\_steps^{-1.5}) \)。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 在预训练时也使用了 Adam 和 warmup，但其学习率调度方式有所不同。ViT 使用了哪种学习率调度？并说明其与 Transformer 调度方式的区别。
ground_truth: ViT 在预训练时使用了线性学习率衰减（linear decay）调度，即学习率线性增加到峰值后线性下降。而原始 Transformer 使用的是“预热后平方根倒数衰减”（inverse square root decay），即在预热期后学习率与步数的平方根成反比下降。两者都包含预热阶段，但衰减曲线不同。
answer:
根据检索到的本地知识库内容，针对 Transformer 与 ViT 的学习率调度方式及区别说明如下：

**1. Transformer (Vaswani et al.) 的学习率调度**
Transformer 模型在训练时采用了 Adam 优化器，其学习率调度遵循特定公式：\( lrate = d_{\text{model}}^{-0.5} \cdot \min(step\_num^{-0.5}, step\_num \cdot warmup\_steps^{-1.5}) \) [1]。该调度方式对应于在前 \( warmup\_steps \) 个训练步骤内线性增加学习率，此后按步数倒数的平方根比例进行衰减 [1]。文中设定的 \( warmup\_steps \) 为 4000 [1]。

**2. ViT (Dosovitskiy et al.) 的学习率调度**
关于 ViT 预训练时的学习率调度，检索到的文档在不同章节提供了具体信息：
*   在**自监督预训练**（self-supervised pre-training）的详细设置中，明确指出使用了余弦学习率衰减（cosine learning rate decay），并配合 10k 步的 warmup [3]。
*   在**通用训练与微调设置**（Training & Fine-tuning）的描述中，提到使用了线性学习率预热和衰减（linear learning rate warmup and decay） [4]。

**3. 两者调度方式的区别**
基于现有证据，两者的主要区别体现在衰减策略和预热参数上：
*   **衰减策略**：Transformer 采用反平方根衰减（inverse square root decay） [1]；而 ViT 在自监督预训练的具体配置中采用了余弦衰减（cosine decay） [3]（尽管通用设置描述中提及了线性衰减 [4]）。
*   **Warmup 步数**：Transformer 设定为 4000 步 [1]；ViT 在自监督预训练中设定为 10k 步 [3]。
judge_reason: 检索上下文包含Transformer和ViT学习率调度的直接证据，支持答案关键事实；答案完全基于上下文，无额外补全。

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf::chunk::36
retrieved_contexts.summary:
We used the Adam optimizer [20] with $\beta _ { 1 } = 0 . 9$ , $\beta _ { 2 } = 0 . 9 8$ and $\epsilon = 1 0 ^ { - 9 }$ . We varied the learning rate over the course of training, according to the formula:

$$
l r a t e = d _ { \mathrm { m o d e l } } ^ { - 0 . 5 } \cdot \mathrm { m i n } ( s t e p _ { - } n u m ^ { - 0 . 5 } , s t e p _ { - } n u m \cdot w a r m u p _ { - } s t e p s ^ { - 1 . 5 } )
$$

This corresponds to increasing the learning rate linearly for the first warmup_steps training steps, and decreasing it thereafter proportionally to the inverse square root of the step number. We used warmup_steps $= 4 0 0 0$ .

retrieved_contexts.summary: We trained our self-supervised model for 1M steps (ca. 14 epochs) with batch size 4096 on JFT. We use Adam, with a base learning rate of $2 \cdot 1 0 ^ { - 4 }$ , warmup of $1 0 \mathrm { k }$ steps and cosine learning rate decay. As prediction targets for pretraining we tried the following settings: 1) predicting only the mean, 3bit color (i.e., 1 prediction of 512 colors), 2) predicting a $4 \times 4$ downsized version of the $1 6 \times 1 6$ patch with 3bit colors in parallel (i.e., 16 predictions of 512 colors), 3) regression on the full patch using L2 (i.e., 256 regressions on the 3 RGB channels). Surprisingly, we found that all worked quite well, though L2 was slightly worse. We report final results only for option 1) because it has shown best few-shot performance. We also experimented with $15 \%$ corruption rate as used by Devlin et al. (2019) but results were also slightly worse on our few-shot metrics.

retrieved_contexts.summary: Training & Fine-tuning. We train all models, including ResNets, using Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2015) with $\beta _ { 1 } = 0 . 9$ , $\beta _ { 2 } = 0 . 9 9 9$ , a batch size of 4096 and apply a high weight decay of 0.1, which we found to be useful for transfer of all models (Appendix D.1 shows that, in contrast to common practices, Adam works slightly better than SGD for ResNets in our setting). We use a linear learning rate warmup and decay, see Appendix B.1 for details. For fine-tuning we use SGD with momentum, batch size 512, for all models, see Appendix B.1.1. For ImageNet results in Table 2, we fine-tuned at higher resolution: 512 for ViT-L/16 and 518 for ViT-H/14, and also used Polyak & Juditsky (1992) averaging with a factor of 0.9999 (Ramachandran et al., 2019; Wang et al., 2020b).

retrieved_contexts.summary: However, the picture changes if the models are trained on larger datasets (14M-300M images). We find that large scale training trumps inductive bias. Our Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results when pre-trained at sufficient scale and transferred to tasks with fewer datapoints. When pre-trained on the public ImageNet-21k dataset or the in-house JFT-300M dataset, ViT approaches or beats state of the art on multiple image recognition benchmarks. In particular, the best model reaches the accuracy of $8 8 . 5 5 \%$ on ImageNet, $9 0 . 7 2 \%$ on ImageNet-ReaL, $9 4 . 5 5 \%$ on CIFAR-100, and $7 7 . 6 3 \%$ on the VTAB suite of 19 tasks.

retrieved_contexts.summary: We evaluate the representation learning capabilities of ResNet, Vision Transformer (ViT), and the hybrid. To understand the data requirements of each model, we pre-train on datasets of varying size and evaluate many benchmark tasks. When considering the computational cost of pre-training the model, ViT performs very favourably, attaining state of the art on most recognition benchmarks at a lower pre-training cost. Lastly, we perform a small experiment using self-supervision, and show that self-supervised ViT holds promise for the future.

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在处理序列时，通过位置编码注入位置信息。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 在处理图像时，除了位置嵌入外，在 patch 提取和分辨率调整时也手动注入了二维结构信息。根据 ViT 原文，这两个注入点分别是什么？它们共同构成了 ViT 的什么属性？
ground_truth: 这两个注入点是：1) 在模型开始时，通过将图像切割成 patch 并展平为一维序列，保留了 patch 在原始图像中的网格结构；2) 在微调时处理更高分辨率图像时，对预训练的位置嵌入进行二维插值，以适配新的 patch 网格。这两个操作是 ViT 中仅有的对图像二维结构进行显式注入的地方，构成了 ViT 的“归纳偏置”（inductive bias）。
answer: 根据 ViT 原文，这两个注入点分别是：在模型开始时将图像切割成 patch（cutting the image into patches），以及在微调时针对不同分辨率的图像调整位置嵌入（adjusting the position embeddings for images of different resolution）[1]。这两处使用共同构成了 ViT 中对二维邻域结构（two-dimensional neighborhood structure）的稀疏注入，反映了其相较于 CNN 较少的特定于图像的归纳偏置（image-specific inductive bias）[1]。
judge_reason: retrieved_contexts 明确提到了两个注入点和归纳偏置，直接支持答案；答案内容完全基于retrieved_contexts，无添加或歪曲。

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::19
retrieved_contexts.summary: Inductive bias. We note that Vision Transformer has much less image-specific inductive bias than CNNs. In CNNs, locality, two-dimensional neighborhood structure, and translation equivariance are baked into each layer throughout the whole model. In ViT, only MLP layers are local and translationally equivariant, while the self-attention layers are global. The two-dimensional neighborhood structure is used very sparingly: in the beginning of the model by cutting the image into patches and at fine-tuning time for adjusting the position embeddings for images of different resolution (as described below). Other than that, the position embeddings at initialization time carry no information about the 2D positions of the patches and all spatial relations between the patches have to be learned from scratch.

retrieved_contexts.summary: Table 8 summarizes the results from this ablation study on a ViT-B/16 model. As we can see, while there is a large gap between the performances of the model with no positional embedding and models with positional embedding, there is little to no difference between different ways of encoding positional information. We speculate that since our Transformer encoder operates on patch-level inputs, as opposed to pixel-level, the differences in how to encode spatial information is less important. More precisely, in patch-level inputs, the spatial dimensions are much smaller than the original pixel-level inputs, e.g., $1 4 \times 1 4$ as opposed to $2 2 4 \times 2 2 4$ , and learning to represent the spatial relations in this resolution is equally easy for these different positional encoding strategies. Even so, the specific pattern of position embedding similarity learned by the network depends on the training hyperparameters (Figure 10).

Figure 7 (left) shows the top principal components of the the learned embedding filters. The components resemble plausible basis functions for a low-dimensional representation of the fine structure within each patch.

Self-attention allows ViT to integrate information across the entire image even in the lowest layers. We investigate to what degree the network makes use of this capability. Specifically, we compute the average distance in image space across which information is integrated, based on the attention weights (Figure 7, right). This “attention distance” is analogous to receptive field size in CNNs.

retrieved_contexts.summary: To understand how ViT uses self-attention to integrate information across the image, we analyzed the average distance spanned by attention weights at different layers (Figure 11). This “attention distance” is analogous to receptive field size in CNNs. Average attention distance is highly variable across heads in lower layers, with some heads attending to much of the image, while others attend to small regions at or near the query location. As depth increases, attention distance increases for all heads. In the second half of the network, most heads attend widely across tokens.

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::87
retrieved_contexts.summary: We ran ablations on scaling different dimensions of the Transformer architecture to find out which are best suited for scaling to very large models. Figure 8 shows 5-shot performance on ImageNet for different configurations. All configurations are based on a ViT model with 8 layers, $D = 1 0 2 4$ , $D _ { M L P } = 2 0 4 8$ and a patch size of 32, the intersection of all lines. We can see that scaling the depth results in the biggest improvements which are clearly visible up until 64 layers. However, diminishing returns are already visible after 16 layers. Interestingly, scaling the width of the network seems to result in the smallest changes. Decreasing the patch size and thus increasing the effective sequence length shows surprisingly robust improvements without introducing parameters. These findings suggest that compute might be a better predictor of performance than the number of parameters, and that scaling should emphasize depth over width if any. Overall, we find that scaling all dimensions proportionally results in robust improvements.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 中，多头注意力被应用在三个地方：编码器自注意力、解码器自注意力、编码器-解码器注意力。Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 在处理图时，只使用了类似于编码器自注意力的结构，即所有节点（包括 [VNode]）之间相互进行自注意力。为什么 Graphormer 不需要像原始 Transformer 那样使用编码器-解码器交叉注意力？
ground_truth: 因为 Graphormer 处理的是图级预测任务，其输入只有一个图（或一组节点），没有像序列到序列任务那样的“源序列”和“目标序列”之分。模型的目标是学习整个图的表示，而不是将一个序列解码为另一个序列。因此，只需要一个单一的编码器（自注意力）堆栈，通过 [VNode] 作为读出单元来聚合图级信息，无需交叉注意力机制。
answer: 根据检索到的文献内容，原始 Transformer 模型在架构设计中使用了三种不同的多头注意力机制，其中包括编码器 - 解码器注意力 [2]。而 Graphormer 是直接基于经典的 Transformer 编码器实现构建的 [5]。该模型主要应用于图级预测任务 [3]。在 Graphormer 的结构中，自注意力机制允许每个节点关注所有其他节点，从而能够模拟图级 READOUT 操作以聚合来自整个图的信息 [10]。因此，Graphormer 采用编码器结构配合自注意力机制来处理图表示学习，而非像完整 Transformer 那样引入编码器 - 解码器交叉注意力 [2][5]。
judge_reason: 检索上下文提供了Graphormer基于Transformer编码器和应用于图级任务的信息，但未直接支持为何无需交叉注意力的关键原因；答案大部分忠于检索内容，但‘模拟READOUT操作’部分可能不完全基于检索。

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf::chunk::5
retrieved_contexts.summary:
Attention mechanisms have become an integral part of compelling sequence modeling and transduction models in various tasks, allowing modeling of dependencies without regard to their distance in the input or output sequences [2, 19]. In all but a few cases [27], however, such attention mechanisms are used in conjunction with a recurrent network.

In this work we propose the Transformer, a model architecture eschewing recurrence and instead relying entirely on an attention mechanism to draw global dependencies between input and output. The Transformer allows for significantly more parallelization and can reach a new state of the art in translation quality after being trained for as little as twelve hours on eight P100 GPUs.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::3
retrieved_contexts.summary: In this paper, we give an affirmative answer by developing Graphormer, which is directly built upon the standard Transformer, and achieves state-of-the-art performance on a wide range of graphlevel prediction tasks, including the very recent Open Graph Benchmark Large-Scale Challenge (OGB-LSC) [21], and several popular leaderboards (e.g., OGB [22], Benchmarking-GNN [14]). The Transformer is originally designed for sequence modeling. To utilize its power in graphs, we believe the key is to properly incorporate structural information of graphs into the model. Note that for each node $i$ , the self-attention only calculates the semantic similarity between $i$ and other nodes, without considering the structural information of a graph reflected on the nodes and the relation between node pairs. Graphormer incorporates several effective structural encoding methods to leverage such information, which are described below.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::1
retrieved_contexts.summary: While the Transformer architecture has become the de-facto standard for natural language processing tasks, its applications to computer vision remain limited. In vision, attention is either applied in conjunction with convolutional networks, or used to replace certain components of convolutional networks while keeping their overall structure in place. We show that this reliance on CNNs is not necessary and a pure transformer applied directly to sequences of image patches can perform very well on image classification tasks. When pre-trained on large amounts of data and transferred to multiple mid-sized or small image recognition benchmarks (ImageNet, CIFAR-100, VTAB, etc.), Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results compared to state-of-the-art convolutional networks while requiring substantially fewer computational resources to train.1

retrieved_contexts.summary: We have explored the direct application of Transformers to graph representation. With three novel graph structural encodings, the proposed Graphormer works surprisingly well on a wide range of popular benchmark datasets. While these initial results are encouraging, many challenges remain. For example, the quadratic complexity of the self-attention module restricts Graphormer’s application on large graphs. Therefore, future development of efficient Graphormer is necessary. Performance improvement could be expected by leveraging domain knowledge-powered encodings on particular graph datasets. Finally, an applicable graph sampling strategy is desired for node representation extraction with Graphormer. We leave them for future works.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::2
retrieved_contexts.summary: The Transformer [49] is well acknowledged as the most powerful neural network in modelling sequential data, such as natural language [11, 35, 6] and speech [17]. Model variants built upon Transformer have also been shown great performance in computer vision [12, 36] and programming language [19, 63, 44]. However, to the best of our knowledge, Transformer has still not been the de-facto standard on public graph representation leaderboards [22, 14, 21]. There are many attempts of leveraging Transformer into the graph domain, but the only effective way is replacing some key modules (e.g., feature aggregation) in classic GNN variants by the softmax attention [50, 7, 23, 51, 61, 46, 13]. Therefore, it is still an open question whether Transformer architecture is suitable to model graphs and how to make it work in graph representation learning.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::51
retrieved_contexts.summary: There are several works that study the performance of pure Transformer architectures (stacked by transformer layers) with modifications on graph representation tasks, which are more related to our Graphormer. For example, several parts of the transformer layer are modified in [46], including an additional GNN employed in attention sub-layer to produce vectors of $Q$ , $K$ , and $V$ , long-range residual connection, and two branches of FFN to produce node and edge representations separately. They pre-train their model on 10 million unlabelled molecules and achieve excellent results by fine-tuning on downstream tasks. Attention module is modified to a soft adjacency matrix in [41] by directly adding the adjacency matrix and RDKit6-computed inter-atomic distance matrix to the attention probabilites. Very recently, Dwivedi et al. [13] revisit a series of works for Transformerbased GNNs, and suggest that the attention mechanism in Transformers on graph data should only aggregate the information from neighborhood (i.e., using adjacent matrix as attention mask) to ensure graph sparsity, and propose to use Laplacian eigenvector as positional encoding. Their model GT surpasses baseline GNNs on graph representation task. A concurrent work [28] propose a novel full Laplacian spectrum to learn the position of each node in a graph, and empirically shows better results than GT.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 中，解码器的自注意力子层通过掩码（mask）将未来位置的注意力权重设为 \( -\infty \)，以实现自回归。Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 在处理图时，并没有这种时间顺序上的因果约束。但 Graphormer 在空间编码（SPD）中，对不可达的节点对（SPD 未定义）也使用了 \( -\infty \) 吗？请说明。
ground_truth: 没有。Graphormer 对于不可达的节点对（即不存在路径的两个节点），将 \( \phi(v_i,v_j) \) 设为一个特殊值（如 -1），并分配一个可学习的标量 \( b_{-1} \)，而不是 \( -\infty \)。这是因为在图结构中，即使两个节点不直接或间接相连，它们的特征仍然可能存在相关性（例如在分子图中，不连通的片段可能是功能基团），完全屏蔽它们会丢失信息。
answer: 根据检索到的本地知识库内容，Ying 等人（2021）在《Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation》一文中讨论了空间编码（Spatial Encoding）的使用 [5]。在证明自注意力模块结合空间编码可以表示均值聚合（MEAN AGGREGATE）的特定上下文中，文中提到设置偏置项 $b_\phi$ 的规则：当 $\phi = 1$ 时设为 $0$，否则设为 $-\infty$，其中 $\phi$ 代表 SPD [5]。然而，提供的文本片段并未明确说明这一机制是否直接应用于处理“不可达节点对”（即 SPD 未定义的情况），仅展示了在特定证明场景下利用 SPD 和 $-\infty$ 进行掩码的逻辑 [5]。因此，关于 Graphormer 在一般情况下的不可达节点对处理细节，现有检索内容未给出明确结论。
judge_reason: 检索上下文仅提及Graphormer在特定证明中使用-∞，未直接支持不可达节点对的处理方式；回答准确反映检索内容，未添加额外信息。

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf::chunk::5
retrieved_contexts.summary:
Attention mechanisms have become an integral part of compelling sequence modeling and transduction models in various tasks, allowing modeling of dependencies without regard to their distance in the input or output sequences [2, 19]. In all but a few cases [27], however, such attention mechanisms are used in conjunction with a recurrent network.

In this work we propose the Transformer, a model architecture eschewing recurrence and instead relying entirely on an attention mechanism to draw global dependencies between input and output. The Transformer allows for significantly more parallelization and can reach a new state of the art in translation quality after being trained for as little as twelve hours on eight P100 GPUs.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::1
retrieved_contexts.summary: While the Transformer architecture has become the de-facto standard for natural language processing tasks, its applications to computer vision remain limited. In vision, attention is either applied in conjunction with convolutional networks, or used to replace certain components of convolutional networks while keeping their overall structure in place. We show that this reliance on CNNs is not necessary and a pure transformer applied directly to sequences of image patches can perform very well on image classification tasks. When pre-trained on large amounts of data and transferred to multiple mid-sized or small image recognition benchmarks (ImageNet, CIFAR-100, VTAB, etc.), Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results compared to state-of-the-art convolutional networks while requiring substantially fewer computational resources to train.1
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::19
retrieved_contexts.summary: Inductive bias. We note that Vision Transformer has much less image-specific inductive bias than CNNs. In CNNs, locality, two-dimensional neighborhood structure, and translation equivariance are baked into each layer throughout the whole model. In ViT, only MLP layers are local and translationally equivariant, while the self-attention layers are global. The two-dimensional neighborhood structure is used very sparingly: in the beginning of the model by cutting the image into patches and at fine-tuning time for adjusting the position embeddings for images of different resolution (as described below). Other than that, the position embeddings at initialization time carry no information about the 2D positions of the patches and all spatial relations between the patches have to be learned from scratch.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

Making generation less sequential is another research goals of ours.

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::49
retrieved_contexts.summary: We find that some heads attend to most of the image already in the lowest layers, showing that the ability to integrate information globally is indeed used by the model. Other attention heads have consistently small attention distances in the low layers. This highly localized attention is less pronounced in hybrid models that apply a ResNet before the Transformer (Figure 7, right), suggesting that it may serve a similar function as early convolutional layers in CNNs. Further, the attention distance increases with network depth. Globally, we find that the model attends to image regions that are semantically relevant for classification (Figure 6).

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::8
retrieved_contexts.summary: Naive application of self-attention to images would require that each pixel attends to every other pixel. With quadratic cost in the number of pixels, this does not scale to realistic input sizes. Thus, to apply Transformers in the context of image processing, several approximations have been tried in the past. Parmar et al. (2018) applied the self-attention only in local neighborhoods for each query pixel instead of globally. Such local multi-head dot-product self attention blocks can completely replace convolutions (Hu et al., 2019; Ramachandran et al., 2019; Zhao et al., 2020). In a different line of work, Sparse Transformers (Child et al., 2019) employ scalable approximations to global selfattention in order to be applicable to images. An alternative way to scale attention is to apply it in blocks of varying sizes (Weissenborn et al., 2019), in the extreme case only along individual axes (Ho et al., 2019; Wang et al., 2020a). Many of these specialized attention architectures demonstrate promising results on computer vision tasks, but require complex engineering to be implemented efficiently on hardware accelerators.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在表 3 的行 (D) 中，增加了 dropout 率后，模型的 BLEU 分数从 25.8 提升到 26.0。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 在预训练时也对不同的数据集使用了不同的 dropout。根据 ViT 的附录表 3，当在 ImageNet 上从头训练时，ViT 使用了较高的 dropout 率（0.1）。结合 Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 在 PCQM4M-LSC 上的设置（附录 B.2.1），为何 Graphormer 在预训练时没有使用 dropout（embedding dropout 为 0）？
ground_truth: Graphormer 在 PCQM4M-LSC 预训练时将 embedding dropout 设为 0，是因为分子图相对较小（每个分子中原子数的中位数约为 15），图属性对每个节点的嵌入较为敏感。引入 dropout 可能会过度干扰节点表示，导致性能下降。而在 ViT 的 ImageNet 训练中，图像数据量（1.3M）相比 JFT（303M）较小，需要更强的正则化（如 dropout）来防止过拟合。
answer:
根据检索到的本地知识库内容，Graphormer 在 PCQM4M-LSC 预训练时未使用 dropout（embedding dropout 为 0）的原因主要基于实证结果和数据结构特性：

1.  **实证性能影响**：尽管许多之前的 Transformer 工作默认将 embedding dropout 比率设为 0.1[1]，但 Ying 等人通过实验发现，对于 PCQM4M-LSC 数据集，较小的 embedding dropout 比率（例如 0.1）会导致验证集上出现可观察到的性能下降 [1]。
2.  **数据结构敏感性**：造成这一现象的一个可能原因是该数据集的分子图相对较小，即每个分子的中位原子数约为 15，这使得图属性对每个节点的嵌入更加敏感 [1]。因此，为了避免性能损失，他们将 embedding dropout 比率设置为 0[1]。

相比之下，其他模型在该任务中的设置有所不同：Transformer 模型在机器翻译任务中使用了 0.1 的 dropout 率以优化 BLEU 分数 [2][3]；ViT 在 ImageNet 预训练中也发现强正则化（包括 Dropout）是训练的关键要素 [4]。但在 Graphormer 针对 PCQM4M-LSC 的具体场景中，数据规模特性决定了不使用 dropout 的策略优于常规设置。
judge_reason: 检索到的上下文直接包含Graphormer未使用dropout的实证原因和数据结构敏感性；答案准确复述上下文内容，未添加外部信息。

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::70
retrieved_contexts.summary: We report the detailed hyper-parameter settings used for training Graphormer in Table 7. We reduce the FFN inner-layer dimension of $4 d$ in [49] to $d$ , which does not appreciably hurt the performance but significantly save the parameters. The embedding dropout ratio is set to 0.1 by default in many previous Transformer works [11, 35]. However, we empirically find that a small embedding dropout ratio (e.g., 0.1) would lead to an observable performance drop on validation set of PCQM4M-LSC. One possible reason is that the molecular graph is relative small (i.e., the median of #atoms in each molecule is about 15), making graph property more sensitive to the embeddings of each node. Therefore, we set embedding dropout ratio to 0 on this dataset.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

Residual Dropout We apply dropout [33] to the output of each sub-layer, before it is added to the sub-layer input and normalized. In addition, we apply dropout to the sums of the embeddings and the positional encodings in both the encoder and decoder stacks. For the base model, we use a rate of $P _ { d r o p } = 0 . 1$ .

Label Smoothing During training, we employed label smoothing of value $\epsilon _ { l s } = 0 . 1$ [36]. This hurts perplexity, as the model learns to be more unsure, but improves accuracy and BLEU score.

retrieved_contexts.summary: Figure 5 contains the transfer performance versus total pre-training compute (see Appendix D.5 for details on computational costs). Detailed results per model are provided in Table 6 in the Appendix. A few patterns can be observed. First, Vision Transformers dominate ResNets on the performance/compute trade-off. ViT uses approximately $2 - 4 \times$ less compute to attain the same performance (average over 5 datasets). Second, hybrids slightly outperform ViT at small computational budgets, but the difference vanishes for larger models. This result is somewhat surprising, since one might expect convolutional local feature processing to assist ViT at any size. Third, Vision Transformers appear not to saturate within the range tried, motivating future scaling efforts.

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 中，层归一化（LayerNorm）被应用于残差连接之后，即 \( \mathrm{LayerNorm}(x + \mathrm{Sublayer}(x)) \)。Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 采用了预层归一化（Pre-LayerNorm），即 \( \mathrm{Sublayer}(\mathrm{LayerNorm}(x)) + x \)。请结合 ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 的架构描述，说明 ViT 采用的是哪种归一化方案？
ground_truth: ViT 采用的是 Pre-LayerNorm 方案，即层归一化应用在自注意力和 MLP 模块之前，然后与残差连接相加。这在 ViT 的公式 (2) 和 (3) 中有明确描述：\( \mathbf{z}_\ell = \mathrm{MSA}(\mathrm{LN}(\mathbf{z}_{\ell-1})) + \mathbf{z}_{\ell-1} \)，\( \mathbf{z}_\ell = \mathrm{MLP}(\mathrm{LN}(\mathbf{z}_\ell)) + \mathbf{z}_\ell' \)。这与 Graphormer 一致，都是现代 Transformer 的常见实践。
answer: 根据检索到的本地知识库内容，提供的文档片段中未包含 ViT 架构中 LayerNorm 具体应用位置（Pre-LayerNorm 或 Post-LayerNorm）的明确描述。尽管 [10] 指出模型设计尽可能遵循原始 Transformer，但未详述归一化顺序，文献未提及。
judge_reason: 检索的上下文未直接提及ViT的归一化方案，回答正确指出信息缺失并基于上下文。

retrieved_contexts.summary: Inductive bias. We note that Vision Transformer has much less image-specific inductive bias than CNNs. In CNNs, locality, two-dimensional neighborhood structure, and translation equivariance are baked into each layer throughout the whole model. In ViT, only MLP layers are local and translationally equivariant, while the self-attention layers are global. The two-dimensional neighborhood structure is used very sparingly: in the beginning of the model by cutting the image into patches and at fine-tuning time for adjusting the position embeddings for images of different resolution (as described below). Other than that, the position embeddings at initialization time carry no information about the 2D positions of the patches and all spatial relations between the patches have to be learned from scratch.

retrieved_contexts.summary: An overview of the model is depicted in Figure 1. The standard Transformer receives as input a 1D sequence of token embeddings. To handle 2D images, we reshape the image $\mathbf { x } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { H \times W \times \dot { C } }$ into a sequence of flattened 2D patches $\mathbf { x } _ { p } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { N \times ( P ^ { 2 } \cdot C ) }$ , where $( H , W )$ is the resolution of the original image, $C$ is the number of channels, $( P , P )$ is the resolution of each image patch, and $N = H W / P ^ { 2 }$ is the resulting number of patches, which also serves as the effective input sequence length for the Transformer. The Transformer uses constant latent vector size $D$ through all of its layers, so we flatten the patches and map to $D$ dimensions with a trainable linear projection (Eq. 1). We refer to the output of this projection as the patch embeddings.

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf::chunk::87
retrieved_contexts.summary: We ran ablations on scaling different dimensions of the Transformer architecture to find out which are best suited for scaling to very large models. Figure 8 shows 5-shot performance on ImageNet for different configurations. All configurations are based on a ViT model with 8 layers, $D = 1 0 2 4$ , $D _ { M L P } = 2 0 4 8$ and a patch size of 32, the intersection of all lines. We can see that scaling the depth results in the biggest improvements which are clearly visible up until 64 layers. However, diminishing returns are already visible after 16 layers. Interestingly, scaling the width of the network seems to result in the smallest changes. Decreasing the patch size and thus increasing the effective sequence length shows surprisingly robust improvements without introducing parameters. These findings suggest that compute might be a better predictor of performance than the number of parameters, and that scaling should emphasize depth over width if any. Overall, we find that scaling all dimensions proportionally results in robust improvements.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Dosovitskiy 等 - 2021 - An Image is Worth 16x16 Words Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::51
retrieved_contexts.summary: There are several works that study the performance of pure Transformer architectures (stacked by transformer layers) with modifications on graph representation tasks, which are more related to our Graphormer. For example, several parts of the transformer layer are modified in [46], including an additional GNN employed in attention sub-layer to produce vectors of $Q$ , $K$ , and $V$ , long-range residual connection, and two branches of FFN to produce node and edge representations separately. They pre-train their model on 10 million unlabelled molecules and achieve excellent results by fine-tuning on downstream tasks. Attention module is modified to a soft adjacency matrix in [41] by directly adding the adjacency matrix and RDKit6-computed inter-atomic distance matrix to the attention probabilites. Very recently, Dwivedi et al. [13] revisit a series of works for Transformerbased GNNs, and suggest that the attention mechanism in Transformers on graph data should only aggregate the information from neighborhood (i.e., using adjacent matrix as attention mask) to ensure graph sparsity, and propose to use Laplacian eigenvector as positional encoding. Their model GT surpasses baseline GNNs on graph representation task. A concurrent work [28] propose a novel full Laplacian spectrum to learn the position of each node in a graph, and empirically shows better results than GT.

question: Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 在 4.1 节中，通过表 1 比较了不同层类型的计算复杂度和最大路径长度。ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 在实验中发现，当预训练数据规模足够大时（如 JFT-300M），ViT 能够超越具有更强归纳偏置的 CNN。Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 在 PCQM4M-LSC 等图数据集上也取得了超越传统 GNN 的性能。结合三者，请总结 Transformer 架构（包括 ViT 和 Graphormer）在何种情况下能够超越具有特定归纳偏置的模型（如 CNN、GNN）？
ground_truth: Transformer 架构（包括其变体）在数据规模足够大时能够超越具有特定归纳偏置的模型。当数据量充足时，模型可以从数据中直接学习到必要的结构规律（如图像的二维邻域关系、图的连通性），而不需要依赖内置的归纳偏置（如 CNN 的局部性和平移等变性、GNN 的消息传递）。ViT 在 JFT-300M 上超越 ResNet，Graphormer 在 PCQM4M-LSC 上超越 GIN，都印证了这一观点。但当数据量较小时，内置的归纳偏置对于防止过拟合、提升泛化能力至关重要。
answer:
根据提供的检索证据，Transformer 架构（包括 ViT 和 Graphormer）在以下情况下能够超越具有特定归纳偏置的模型（如 CNN、GNN）：

**1. 大规模数据预训练是核心前提**
当预训练数据规模足够大时，Transformer 能够克服其缺乏特定领域归纳偏置的劣势。研究表明，“大规模训练胜过归纳偏置”（large scale training trumps inductive bias）[3]。Vision Transformer (ViT) 在 ImageNet-21k 或 JFT-300M 等大规模数据集上预训练后，能够在多个图像识别基准测试中达到或超越最先进状态 [3]。只要耦合了大规模数据集上的预训练，纯 Transformer 策略就能在图像分类任务中匹配或超过最先进水平的卷积网络 [5]。ViT 在预训练于大量数据并迁移到多个中等或小规模图像识别基准时，表现优于最先进的卷积网络 [8]。

**2. 模型规模与计算预算的增长**
在扩展研究中发现，虽然混合模型在较小的计算预算下略优于 ViT，但这种差异随着模型变大而消失 [7]。Vision Transformers 在性能与计算成本的权衡上主导了 ResNets，且 Vision Transformers 在尝试范围内似乎尚未饱和 [7]。这意味着随着模型规模和计算资源的增加，Transformer 架构的优势会更加明显，不再依赖卷积带来的局部特征处理辅助 [7]。

**3. 图结构任务的特定改进与无监督学习**
对于图数据，纯 Transformer 架构通常需要针对图表示进行特定修改才能有效工作。例如，通过修改注意力模块（如使用软邻接矩阵）、引入位置编码（如拉普拉斯特征向量）或使用图神经网络组件来生成 Q、K、V 向量，可以显著提升性能 [9]。部分工作在 1000 万张无标签分子上进行预训练，并在下游任务微调后取得了优异结果 [9]。此外，有研究提出的 GT 模型在图表示任务上超越了基线 GNN [9]。这表明在图领域，结合大规模无监督预训练及针对性的架构调整，Transformer 也能超越传统 GNN。

综上所述，Transformer 架构超越具有强归纳偏置模型的关键条件在于：**利用大规模数据进行预训练以弥补归纳偏置的缺失**，以及**在更大的模型规模下发挥其可扩展性优势**。
judge_reason: 检索上下文主要支持ViT的大规模数据预训练，但未直接提供Graphormer超越GNN的证据；answer在图部分添加了未提供的细节，降低了忠实性。

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::2
retrieved_contexts.summary: The Transformer [49] is well acknowledged as the most powerful neural network in modelling sequential data, such as natural language [11, 35, 6] and speech [17]. Model variants built upon Transformer have also been shown great performance in computer vision [12, 36] and programming language [19, 63, 44]. However, to the best of our knowledge, Transformer has still not been the de-facto standard on public graph representation leaderboards [22, 14, 21]. There are many attempts of leveraging Transformer into the graph domain, but the only effective way is replacing some key modules (e.g., feature aggregation) in classic GNN variants by the softmax attention [50, 7, 23, 51, 61, 46, 13]. Therefore, it is still an open question whether Transformer architecture is suitable to model graphs and how to make it work in graph representation learning.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

Our Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results when pre-trained at sufficient scale and transferred to tasks with fewer datapoints. When pre-trained on the public ImageNet-21k dataset or the in-house JFT-300M dataset, ViT approaches or beats state of the art on multiple image recognition benchmarks. In particular, the best model reaches the accuracy of $8 8 . 5 5 \%$ on ImageNet, $9 0 . 7 2 \%$ on ImageNet-ReaL, $9 4 . 5 5 \%$ on CIFAR-100, and $7 7 . 6 3 \%$ on the VTAB suite of 19 tasks.

retrieved_contexts.summary: We have explored the direct application of Transformers to image recognition. Unlike prior works using self-attention in computer vision, we do not introduce image-specific inductive biases into the architecture apart from the initial patch extraction step. Instead, we interpret an image as a sequence of patches and process it by a standard Transformer encoder as used in NLP. This simple, yet scalable, strategy works surprisingly well when coupled with pre-training on large datasets. Thus, Vision Transformer matches or exceeds the state of the art on many image classification datasets, whilst being relatively cheap to pre-train.

ViT uses approximately $2 - 4 \times$ less compute to attain the same performance (average over 5 datasets). retrieved_contexts.summary: While the Transformer architecture has become the de-facto standard for natural language processing tasks, its applications to computer vision remain limited. In vision, attention is either applied in conjunction with convolutional networks, or used to replace certain components of convolutional networks while keeping their overall structure in place. We show that this reliance on CNNs is not necessary and a pure transformer applied directly to sequences of image patches can perform very well on image classification tasks. When pre-trained on large amounts of data and transferred to multiple mid-sized or small image recognition benchmarks (ImageNet, CIFAR-100, VTAB, etc.), Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results compared to state-of-the-art convolutional networks while requiring substantially fewer computational resources to train.1

question: 对比 Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 和 Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 在注意力机制中引入“位置/结构信息”的方式。Transformer 使用绝对位置编码与输入相加，而 Graphormer 使用空间编码作为偏置项加入注意力公式。请分析这两种方式的本质区别，以及为什么 Graphormer 不直接将结构信息与节点特征相加？
ground_truth: Transformer 的绝对位置编码是在输入层将位置向量与词嵌入相加，这相当于将位置信息注入到所有后续层的查询、键、值向量中。而 Graphormer 的空间编码（基于最短路径距离）作为偏置项 \( b_{\phi(v_i,v_j)} \) 直接加到注意力矩阵上，这相当于在计算相似度时显式地加入结构先验，但不强制要求节点的表示本身编码其绝对位置。Graphormer 不采用相加方式是因为图结构是非欧几里得的，节点没有固定的顺序，将 SPD 作为偏置项能够更直接地建模节点对之间的相对关系，避免将绝对位置（如节点编号）强加到无意义的顺序上。
answer:
根据检索到的本地知识库内容，关于 Transformer 与 Graphormer 在注意力机制中引入位置/结构信息的方式及其设计动机，分析如下：

**1. 信息注入方式的本质区别**
Graphormer 将结构信息（如边编码、中心性编码等）作为偏置项直接加入注意力计算模块。具体而言，Graphormer 提出的边编码方法通过一个偏置项（bias term）融入注意力模块，修改了注意力矩阵 $A$ 中的元素，使得连接节点对的边特征被考虑在相关性估计中 [9]。相比之下，基于 Transformer 的图表示学习其他工作（如 Graph-BERT）则倾向于将位置编码（PE）嵌入到模型中以表达节点位置信息，即直接将位置信息嵌入到节点特征或模型输入中 [10]。在 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的应用场景中，虽然使用了位置嵌入（position embeddings），但初始化时这些嵌入不携带具体的二维位置信息，空间关系需从头学习 [4]。

**2. 为何选择偏置项而非直接相加至节点特征**
根据现有文献，Graphormer 选择将结构信息作为偏置项加入注意力公式的主要动机是为了更好地在注意力层中对边特征进行编码。文档指出，当前的注意力计算往往忽略了节点中心性等强信号，而 Graphormer 认为这些信息应成为 Transformer 模型的有价值信号 [5]。为了更有效地将这些结构信号纳入考量，Graphormer 提出将边特征通过偏置项直接作用于注意力模块，以确保“连接它们的边应在相关性中被考虑” [9]。这种设计旨在解决标准注意力机制在图数据上未能充分捕捉结构依赖的问题，而非简单地将结构先验叠加到节点特征向量中 [10]。

综上所述，两者的核心差异在于结构信息的融合层级：Graphormer 侧重于在注意力评分阶段（Attention Score）通过偏置项修正相关性计算 [9]，而其他方法可能侧重于在特征表示阶段（Feature Representation）通过嵌入来传递位置信息 [10]。
judge_reason: 检索到的上下文未直接说明Graphormer将结构信息作为偏置项加入注意力公式，答案中部分内容基于检索但添加了未检索到的细节。

retrieved_contexts.summary: While the Transformer architecture has become the de-facto standard for natural language processing tasks, its applications to computer vision remain limited. In vision, attention is either applied in conjunction with convolutional networks, or used to replace certain components of convolutional networks while keeping their overall structure in place. We show that this reliance on CNNs is not necessary and a pure transformer applied directly to sequences of image patches can perform very well on image classification tasks. When pre-trained on large amounts of data and transferred to multiple mid-sized or small image recognition benchmarks (ImageNet, CIFAR-100, VTAB, etc.), Vision Transformer (ViT) attains excellent results compared to state-of-the-art convolutional networks while requiring substantially fewer computational resources to train.1

retrieved_contexts.summary:
Attention mechanisms have become an integral part of compelling sequence modeling and transduction models in various tasks, allowing modeling of dependencies without regard to their distance in the input or output sequences [2, 19]. In all but a few cases [27], however, such attention mechanisms are used in conjunction with a recurrent network.

In this work we propose the Transformer, a model architecture eschewing recurrence and instead relying entirely on an attention mechanism to draw global dependencies between input and output. The Transformer allows for significantly more parallelization and can reach a new state of the art in translation quality after being trained for as little as twelve hours on eight P100 GPUs.

retrieved_contexts.summary: Inductive bias. We note that Vision Transformer has much less image-specific inductive bias than CNNs. In CNNs, locality, two-dimensional neighborhood structure, and translation equivariance are baked into each layer throughout the whole model. In ViT, only MLP layers are local and translationally equivariant, while the self-attention layers are global. The two-dimensional neighborhood structure is used very sparingly: in the beginning of the model by cutting the image into patches and at fine-tuning time for adjusting the position embeddings for images of different resolution (as described below). Other than that, the position embeddings at initialization time carry no information about the 2D positions of the patches and all spatial relations between the patches have to be learned from scratch.

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::2
retrieved_contexts.summary: The Transformer [49] is well acknowledged as the most powerful neural network in modelling sequential data, such as natural language [11, 35, 6] and speech [17]. Model variants built upon Transformer have also been shown great performance in computer vision [12, 36] and programming language [19, 63, 44]. However, to the best of our knowledge, Transformer has still not been the de-facto standard on public graph representation leaderboards [22, 14, 21]. There are many attempts of leveraging Transformer into the graph domain, but the only effective way is replacing some key modules (e.g., feature aggregation) in classic GNN variants by the softmax attention [50, 7, 23, 51, 61, 46, 13]. Therefore, it is still an open question whether Transformer architecture is suitable to model graphs and how to make it work in graph representation learning.

question: 对比 ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 和 Graphormer (Ying et al., 2021) 中“特殊 token”的设计。ViT 使用了 [class] token 作为分类输出，而 Graphormer 使用了 [VNode] 作为图级表示输出。请分析两者的异同，并说明 Graphormer 为何需要为 [VNode] 重置空间编码？
ground_truth: 两者的相同点在于都使用一个可学习的特殊 token，将其与其他输入 token 一起通过 Transformer 编码器，最终取该 token 的输出作为整体表示（图像或图）。不同点在于：1) ViT 的 [class] token 与图像 patch 处于同一序列，但没有显式的结构连接；而 Graphormer 的 [VNode] 通过虚拟边与所有节点相连。2) Graphormer 需要重置涉及 [VNode] 的空间编码（\( b_{\phi} \)），因为如果保留原始的 SPD 计算，[VNode] 与任何节点的最短路径距离会被设为 1，这会引入虚假的“邻近性”先验，而实际上 [VNode] 是抽象的整体表示，不应带有距离信息。
answer:
基于提供的检索证据，对 ViT 和 Graphormer 中特殊 Token 的设计对比及 Graphormer 空间编码的相关分析如下：

**1. ViT 与 Graphormer 特殊 Token 的设计异同**

*   **设计目的与功能：**
    *   **ViT (`[class]` token)：** 在嵌入补丁序列前添加一个可学习的嵌入向量作为 `[class]` token [5]。该 Token 在 Transformer 编码器输出时的状态被用作图像表示 $y$ [5]。在预训练和微调期间，分类头均连接在该 Token 的输出上 [5]。
    *   **Graphormer (Special Node / Virtual Node)：** Graphormer 引入了一个用于图读取（graph readout）的特殊节点 [6]。该设计旨在利用自注意力机制让每个节点关注所有其他节点，从而模拟图级 READOUT 操作以聚合全图信息 [6]。在基线比较中，该节点也被称为虚拟节点（virtual node, -VN） [3]。
    *   **相同点：** 两者均通过引入一个特殊的 Token/节点来充当全局信息的聚合器，并以此生成最终的图级或图像级表示用于下游任务 [5][6]。
    *   **不同点：** ViT 处理的是图像补丁序列，而 Graphormer 处理的是非欧几里得空间的图结构数据 [5][8]。

**2. Graphormer 空间编码与 [VNode] 的说明**

*   **空间编码的作用：** Graphormer 提出了一种新颖的空间编码（Spatial Encoding），旨在捕捉节点间的结构关系 [8]。由于图结构数据不存在像语言或图像那样的规范网格，节点位于非欧几里得空间中，因此模型为每对节点分配基于其空间关系的可学习嵌入 [8]。通常使用任意两节点间的最短路径距离作为示例进行编码，并作为 Softmax 注意力中的偏置项 [8]。
*   **关于 [VNode] 重置空间编码的原因：** 提供的文档片段详细描述了 Graphormer 引入特殊节点用于图读取的功能 [6]，以及空间编码用于捕捉结构关系的必要性 [8]，但**未明确提及**为何需要为 [VNode] 专门“重置”空间编码的具体技术原因或机制细节。提供的证据中仅说明了空间编码是应用于每对节点关系的 [8]，并未包含针对虚拟节点空间编码重置策略的解释。

综上所述，虽然两者都使用了特殊 Token 进行全局表示，但 Graphormer 针对图数据的特殊性设计了空间编码，而关于 [VNode] 空间编码重置的具体理由在当前检索片段中**文献未提及**。
judge_reason: 检索上下文支持特殊token的基本设计，但未直接提供详细异同和重置空间编码的具体原因。

Fact 2. By choosing proper weights, every node representation of the output of a Graphormer layer without additional encodings can represent MEAN READOUT functions.

This fact takes the advantage of self-attention that each node can attend to all other nodes. Thus it can simulate graph-level READOUT operation to aggregate information from the whole graph. The fact also inspires us to introduce a special node for graph readout (see the previous subsection).

In this paper, we mainly evaluate general centrality and distance metric in graph theory, i.e., the degree centrality and the shortest path. retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::5
retrieved_contexts.summary: Second, we propose a novel Spatial Encoding in Graphormer to capture the structural relation between nodes. One notable geometrical property that distinguishes graph-structured data from other structured data, e.g., language, images, is that there does not exist a canonical grid to embed the graph. In fact, nodes can only lie in a non-Euclidean space and are linked by edges. To model such structural information, for each node pair, we assign a learnable embedding based on their spatial relation. Multiple measurements in the literature could be leveraged for modeling spatial relations. For a general purpose, we use the distance of the shortest path between any two nodes as a demonstration, which will be encoded as a bias term in the softmax attention and help the model accurately capture the spatial dependency in a graph. In addition, sometimes there is additional spatial information contained in edge features, such as the type of bond between two atoms in a molecular graph. We design a new edge encoding method to further take such signal into the Transformer layers. To be concrete, for each node pair, we compute an average of dot-products of the edge features and learnable embeddings along the shortest path, then use it in the attention module. Equipped with these encodings, Graphormer could better model the relationship for node pairs and represent the graph.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

question: 对比 Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 和 ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 中的“层归一化位置”。Transformer 原始设计采用后层归一化（Post-LN），而 ViT 采用了前层归一化（Pre-LN）。请对比两种归一化位置的优缺点，并说明为什么现代 Transformer 变体普遍转向 Pre-LN？
ground_truth: Post-LN（\( \mathrm{LayerNorm}(x + \mathrm{Sublayer}(x)) \)）是原始 Transformer 的设计，它在残差连接之后进行归一化。Pre-LN（\( \mathrm{Sublayer}(\mathrm{LayerNorm}(x)) + x \)）将归一化放在子层之前。Pre-LN 的优点是优化更稳定、收敛更快，因为梯度流经残差连接时不会经过层归一化的缩放，避免了梯度爆炸/消失问题；同时训练时对学习率更鲁棒。Post-LN 在深层网络中容易出现梯度不稳定，需要更精细的学习率预热。因此，ViT、Graphormer 以及 BERT、GPT 等后续模型都采用了 Pre-LN。
answer: 根据提供的检索证据，现有文档主要描述了 Transformer 的架构组成 [4]、ViT 对原始设计的遵循程度 [2] 以及训练时的正则化策略 [10]，但并未包含关于 Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 和 ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 中层归一化位置（Pre-LN 或 Post-LN）的具体设计差异、优缺点对比或现代变体转向 Pre-LN 原因的描述。因此，文献未提及。
judge_reason: 检索上下文未涉及层归一化位置的具体对比信息，无法直接支持回答关键事实；answer基于检索内容准确指出文献未提及，忠实于上下文。

retrieved_contexts.summary:
In this work, we presented the Transformer, the first sequence transduction model based entirely on attention, replacing the recurrent layers most commonly used in encoder-decoder architectures with multi-headed self-attention.

For translation tasks, the Transformer can be trained significantly faster than architectures based on recurrent or convolutional layers. On both WMT 2014 English-to-German and WMT 2014 English-to-French translation tasks, we achieve a new state of the art. In the former task our best model outperforms even all previously reported ensembles.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Vaswani 等 - 2023 - Attention Is All You Need.pdf

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::2
retrieved_contexts.summary: The Transformer [49] is well acknowledged as the most powerful neural network in modelling sequential data, such as natural language [11, 35, 6] and speech [17]. Model variants built upon Transformer have also been shown great performance in computer vision [12, 36] and programming language [19, 63, 44]. However, to the best of our knowledge, Transformer has still not been the de-facto standard on public graph representation leaderboards [22, 14, 21]. There are many attempts of leveraging Transformer into the graph domain, but the only effective way is replacing some key modules (e.g., feature aggregation) in classic GNN variants by the softmax attention [50, 7, 23, 51, 61, 46, 13]. Therefore, it is still an open question whether Transformer architecture is suitable to model graphs and how to make it work in graph representation learning.
retrieved_contexts.doc_title: Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf

question: 对比 Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) 中的“正弦位置编码”和 ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 中的“可学习一维位置嵌入”。请分析两种方法的核心区别，并说明 ViT 选择可学习嵌入的原因，以及为什么 ViT 没有使用更复杂的 2D 位置嵌入？
ground_truth: 正弦位置编码是固定、非学习的，通过不同频率的正余弦函数为每个位置生成唯一编码，具有可外推至更长序列的优点。可学习位置嵌入则是将位置作为参数进行训练，能够根据数据自适应调整。ViT 选择可学习嵌入是因为图像 patch 序列长度固定（如 14x14=196），无需外推；同时实验表明可学习嵌入与正弦编码性能相当。ViT 没有使用 2D 位置嵌入是因为在 patch 级别（如 14x14）上，模型通过学习已经能够隐式地捕捉行/列结构（位置嵌入的相似性呈现网格模式），因此 2D 感知嵌入未带来额外提升。
answer:
根据提供的检索证据，针对 Transformer 与 ViT 中位置编码方法的对比分析如下：

**1. 核心区别**
Transformer (Vaswani et al.) 中的位置编码采用正弦和余弦函数，具有不同的频率，且这些编码被加到输入嵌入的底部 [9]。相比之下，ViT (Dosovitskiy et al.) 的位置嵌入在初始化时不携带关于图块（patches）二维位置的信息，所有图块之间的空间关系必须从头开始学习 [3]。

**2. ViT 选择可学习嵌入及编码策略的原因**
虽然文档未直接陈述作者为何在“可学习”与“固定”之间做出特定选择，但提供了以下相关依据：
*   **图块级输入降低了编码难度：** ViT 的 Transformer 编码器基于图块级输入而非像素级输入，其空间维度远小于原始像素级输入（例如 $14 \times 14$ 对比 $224 \times 224$），因此在这种分辨率下学习表示空间关系对于不同的位置编码策略来说同样容易 [4]。
*   **不同编码方式效果相近：** 消融研究表明，有无位置嵌入之间存在巨大性能差距，但在不同的位置信息编码方式之间几乎没有差异 [4]。
*   **归纳偏置较少：** Vision Transformer 比 CNN 具有更少的图像特定归纳偏置，除了 MLP 层是局部和平移等变的外，自注意力层是全局的，二维邻域结构仅在模型开始时用于切割图像以及在微调时调整不同分辨率的位置嵌入时使用 [3]。

**3. 未使用复杂 2D 位置嵌入的原因**
*   **处理流程为 1D 序列：** 标准 ViT 将输入处理为一维的图块序列，而非二维形状 [2]。
*   **二维结构使用稀疏：** 二维邻域结构在模型中使用非常稀疏，主要仅用于初始化的图块切割阶段以及微调时的位置嵌入调整 [3]。
*   **探索性修改：** 文档提到为了处理二维形状输入，曾对 ViT 进行修改以包含轴向 Transformer 块（Axial Transformer blocks），这表明标准架构并未原生采用复杂的 2D 位置嵌入，而是通过修改注意力机制来适应 [2]。

综上所述，现有文献指出 ViT 的设计使得位置编码的具体形式（如是否显式包含 2D 信息）对性能影响较小，且其基础架构默认将图像视为一维图块序列进行处理 [3][4]。
judge_reason: 检索上下文主要提供ViT信息，缺少Transformer正弦编码的直接支持；回答中关于Transformer的部分未基于检索证据，但ViT部分引用恰当。

To understand the data requirements of each model, we pre-train on datasets of varying size and evaluate many benchmark tasks. When considering the computational cost of pre-training the model, ViT performs very favourably, attaining state of the art on most recognition benchmarks at a lower pre-training cost. Lastly, we perform a small experiment using self-supervision, and show that self-supervised ViT holds promise for the future.

retrieved_contexts.summary: Inductive bias. We note that Vision Transformer has much less image-specific inductive bias than CNNs. In CNNs, locality, two-dimensional neighborhood structure, and translation equivariance are baked into each layer throughout the whole model. In ViT, only MLP layers are local and translationally equivariant, while the self-attention layers are global. The two-dimensional neighborhood structure is used very sparingly: in the beginning of the model by cutting the image into patches and at fine-tuning time for adjusting the position embeddings for images of different resolution (as described below). Other than that, the position embeddings at initialization time carry no information about the 2D positions of the patches and all spatial relations between the patches have to be learned from scratch.

retrieved_contexts.summary: Table 8 summarizes the results from this ablation study on a ViT-B/16 model. As we can see, while there is a large gap between the performances of the model with no positional embedding and models with positional embedding, there is little to no difference between different ways of encoding positional information. We speculate that since our Transformer encoder operates on patch-level inputs, as opposed to pixel-level, the differences in how to encode spatial information is less important. More precisely, in patch-level inputs, the spatial dimensions are much smaller than the original pixel-level inputs, e.g., $1 4 \times 1 4$ as opposed to $2 2 4 \times 2 2 4$ , and learning to represent the spatial relations in this resolution is equally easy for these different positional encoding strategies. Even so, the specific pattern of position embedding similarity learned by the network depends on the training hyperparameters (Figure 10).

retrieved_contexts.note_id: doc_Ying 等 - 2021 - Do Transformers Really Perform Bad for Graph Representation.pdf::chunk::53
retrieved_contexts.summary: Positional Encoding in Transformer on Graph. Several works introduce positional encoding (PE) to Transformer-based GNNs to help the model capture the node position information. For example, Graph-BERT [61] introduces three types of PE to embed the node position information to model, i.e., an absolute WL-PE which represents different nodes labeled by Weisfeiler-Lehman algorithm, an intimacy based PE and a hop based PE which are both variant to the sampled subgraphs. Absolute Laplacian PE is employed in [13] and empircal study shows that its performance surpasses the absolute WL-PE used in [61].
